/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/poco_template_server.dir/src/main.cpp.o -o poco_template_server  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib: /usr/local/lib/libPocoUtil.so.120 /usr/local/lib/libPocoPrometheus.so.120 /usr/local/lib/libPocoJWT.so.120 /usr/local/lib/libPocoXML.so.120 /usr/local/lib/libPocoNet.so.120 /usr/local/lib/libPocoJSON.so.120 /usr/local/lib/libPocoCrypto.so.120 /usr/local/lib/libPocoFoundation.so.120 -lpthread -ldl -lrt /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
